title: Baleines à bosse : le spectacle magique de Mayotte
hook: Chaque année, des géantes des mers offrent un show à couper le souffle.

caption.caption: 🌊🐋 À Mayotte, les baleines à bosse dansent sous nos yeux… Un spectacle IRRÉEL ! 😍 Vous les avez déjà vues en vrai ? Dites-nous en commentaire ! ⬇️
caption.text:
🌊🐋 À Mayotte, les baleines à bosse dansent sous nos yeux… Un spectacle IRRÉEL ! 😍 Vous les avez déjà vues en vrai ? Dites-nous en commentaire ! ⬇️

#mayotte #976 #oceanindien #baleineabosse #naturemajestueuse #voyagemayotte #merveilleuxnaturel #ecotourisme #faunemarine #decouvertemayotte #cetacees #voyageinsolite #domtom #aventurenature

scenes.narration: Et devine quoi ? De juillet à octobre, les Mahorais ont le privilège d’assister en direct à l’une des plus belles migrations au monde : celle des baleines à bosse !
visuals: aerial drone shot turquoise lagoon with distant whale silhouette sunny morning
group of tourists on boat pointing excitedly at ocean surface
close-up map of Mayotte with migration route from Antarctica highlighted
wide shot golden sunset over calm waters with whale fin visible
scenes.image_prompt: A stunning vertical 9:16 photorealistic cinematic shot of Mayotte's turquoise lagoon at golden hour, aerial drone view showing a small boat with excited tourists pointing at a distant humpback whale fin breaking the surface, warm sunlight reflecting on gentle waves, lush green coastline in the background, vibrant colors, ultra-detailed water texture, realistic lighting and shadows.
scenes.fact_used: Les baleines à bosse migrent à Mayotte de juillet à octobre

scenes.narration: Imagine un peu : ces géantes des mers quittent les glaces de l’Antarctique pour offrir à leurs petits un berceau d’eau turquoise, juste sous les yeux émerveillés des Mahorais.
visuals: extreme close-up icy Antarctic waters with whale tail disappearing into distance
medium shot mother whale swimming gently with newborn calf close to surface
aerial view whale mother and calf gliding through crystal clear lagoon
close-up newborn whale calf nursing from mother underwater
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking vertical 9:16 underwater photorealistic shot of a humpback whale mother gently swimming alongside her newborn calf in Mayotte's crystal-clear lagoon, sunlight filtering through turquoise water creating dancing light patterns, coral reef visible in the background, intimate moment captured with soft focus on the protective mother and curious calf, ultra-detailed skin textures and water effects.
scenes.fact_used: Elles viennent de l'Antarctique pour mettre bas et allaiter dans les eaux chaudes

scenes.narration: Et quand tu vois ces colosses de 15 mètres frôler les pirogues, tu réalises que les Mahorais partagent leur lagon avec des monstres aussi lourds que six éléphants !
visuals: side-by-side comparison whale next to double-decker bus on beach
diver in water next to massive whale tail for scale
aerial shot whale swimming next to small fishing boat
close-up whale eye looking directly at camera underwater
scenes.image_prompt: A dramatic vertical 9:16 photorealistic shot showing a humpback whale's massive body next to a small traditional Mayotte fishing boat, aerial perspective revealing the whale's full 15-meter length, boat passengers looking up in awe at the gentle giant, crystal clear water showing every detail of the whale's skin and the boat's wooden texture, golden hour lighting creating warm reflections.
scenes.fact_used: Une baleine adulte peut peser 30 tonnes et mesurer 15 mètres

scenes.narration: Et là, sous tes yeux ébahis, ces géantes bondissent hors de l’eau à quelques mètres du bord, offrant aux Mahorais un show aquatique plus impressionnant qu’un feu d’artifice !
visuals: wide shot whale breaching completely out of water near coastline
slow-motion capture water droplets flying from whale's body mid-air
tourists on beach shielding eyes watching whale jump in distance
underwater shot whale propelling itself upward toward surface
scenes.image_prompt: An epic vertical 9:16 photorealistic slow-motion capture of a humpback whale breaching completely out of Mayotte's lagoon, massive body suspended in mid-air with water cascading off its skin, coastline visible in the background with amazed spectators on the beach, sunlight creating rainbows in the spray, ultra-detailed texture showing every bump and scar on the whale's body.
scenes.fact_used: Les sauts hors de l'eau sont fréquents, parfois à quelques centaines de mètres du rivage

scenes.narration: Et pendant ce temps, les mâles rivalisent de talent : ils composent des chants envoûtants, de véritables symphonies sous-marines pour charmer les femelles sous les yeux émerveillés des Mahorais.
visuals: underwater hydrophone recording whale songs with sound waves visualization
close-up male whale opening mouth underwater emitting bubbles
researcher on boat listening to whale songs through headphones
split screen whale singing underwater and musical notes appearing
scenes.image_prompt: A mesmerizing vertical 9:16 underwater shot of a male humpback whale singing in Mayotte's lagoon, bubbles streaming from its mouth as it emits complex sounds, hydrophone visible in foreground capturing the melody, sound waves visualized as glowing blue ripples in the water, soft sunlight filtering through the turquoise depths, ultra-detailed whale skin texture and surrounding marine life.
scenes.fact_used: Les mâles chantent des mélodies complexes pour attirer les femelles

scenes.narration: Et le plus incroyable, c’est que ces colosses de 30 tonnes se transforment en mères tendres sous les yeux des Mahorais, offrant un ballet de douceur dans le lagon.
visuals: mother whale gently nudging newborn calf with her nose
close-up whale fin caressing water surface like a hand
tourists on boat watching whale mother and calf with soft expressions
underwater shot whale eye looking gently at camera
scenes.image_prompt: A tender vertical 9:16 underwater shot of a humpback whale mother gently nudging her newborn calf with her nose in Mayotte's warm lagoon, the calf's tiny body contrasting with the mother's massive size, soft sunlight creating a peaceful atmosphere, bubbles rising gently between them, ultra-detailed textures showing the gentle interaction between these gentle giants.
scenes.fact_used: Elles viennent de l'Antarctique pour mettre bas et allaiter dans les eaux chaudes

scenes.narration: Et pour ne rien gâcher de ce moment magique, les Mahorais les observent depuis leurs bateaux en gardant toujours une distance respectueuse, comme le veut la règle.
visuals: boat captain pointing at distance marker on side of vessel
tourists on boat using binoculars to watch whales respectfully
aerial shot boat maintaining proper distance from whale pod
close-up sign on boat explaining observation rules
scenes.image_prompt: A responsible vertical 9:16 shot of a Mayotte whale-watching boat maintaining proper distance from a humpback whale pod, aerial perspective showing the boat's position relative to the whales, tourists using binoculars and cameras with long lenses, clear blue water separating the vessel from the majestic creatures, sunny day with perfect visibility, educational sign visible on the boat's railing.
scenes.fact_used: L'observation se fait depuis bateau, dans le respect d'une distance réglementaire

scenes.narration: Et parfois, le spectacle explose littéralement sous leurs yeux : des sauts de plusieurs mètres, à quelques encablures seulement de la plage, où les Mahorais retiennent leur souffle.
visuals: family on beach pointing excitedly at whale breaching in distance
close-up child's face in awe watching whale jump
wide shot whale tail slapping water near shoreline
slow-motion capture whale splash landing near palm trees
scenes.image_prompt: A magical vertical 9:16 shot of a family on a Mayotte beach watching a humpback whale breach in the distance, parents pointing excitedly while children jump with joy, the whale's massive body suspended above the water with palm trees framing the scene, golden hour lighting creating a warm, dreamy atmosphere, ultra-detailed water spray and beach textures.
scenes.fact_used: Les sauts hors de l'eau sont fréquents, parfois à quelques centaines de mètres du rivage

scenes.narration: Et quand ces géantes des mers dansent devant eux, les Mahorais savent qu’ils vivent un instant rare, un cadeau de la nature gravé à jamais dans leur mémoire.
visuals: tourist on boat with tears in eyes watching whale
close-up camera screen showing whale photo with timestamp
group of friends hugging after whale sighting
wide shot boat returning to shore at sunset with whale fin visible
scenes.image_prompt: An emotional vertical 9:16 shot of a tourist on a Mayotte whale-watching boat with tears in their eyes as they watch a humpback whale mother and calf swimming nearby, the golden sunset reflecting on the water, other passengers looking on with soft expressions, the whale's gentle movements creating ripples in the turquoise lagoon, ultra-detailed textures capturing this unforgettable moment.
scenes.fact_used: Les baleines à bosse migrent à Mayotte de juillet à octobre

scenes.narration: Depuis leur bateau, les Mahorais guident avec passion : on admire ce ballet aquatique sans jamais déranger ces majestueuses reines des océans.
visuals: Mahorais guide pointing at whale while explaining to tourists
close-up guide's hands showing whale vertebrae bone
group on boat listening attentively to guide's stories
guide using tablet to show whale migration routes
scenes.image_prompt: A warm vertical 9:16 shot of a Mahorais guide passionately explaining whale behavior to tourists on a boat, the guide pointing at a humpback whale in the distance while holding a whale vertebrae bone, tourists listening attentively with the Mayotte coastline visible in the background, soft morning light creating a welcoming atmosphere, ultra-detailed textures of the guide's traditional clothing and the boat's wooden deck.
scenes.fact_used: L'observation se fait depuis bateau, dans le respect d'une distance réglementaire

scenes.narration: Et ce spectacle naturel, c’est la preuve éclatante que le lagon de Mayotte, l’un des deux seuls doubles lagons fermés au monde, est un écrin unique pour ces géantes des mers.
visuals: aerial shot double lagoon with whales swimming in inner waters
close-up coral reef with colorful fish swimming around
wide shot traditional Mahorais pirogue sailing near whale
underwater shot whale swimming above vibrant coral garden
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking vertical 9:16 aerial shot of Mayotte's unique double lagoon with humpback whales swimming in the inner waters, the outer reef visible as a white line in the turquoise ocean, traditional Mahorais pirogues sailing nearby, vibrant coral gardens visible beneath the surface, golden hour lighting enhancing the lagoon's incredible colors and textures.
scenes.fact_used: Le lagon mahorais est l'un des deux doubles lagons fermés au monde

scenes.narration: Alors, est-ce que tu as déjà ressenti cette émotion unique en observant les majestueuses baleines à bosse, ces géantes qui émerveillent les Mahorais chaque saison ?
visuals: text overlay 'Et vous ?' with whale breaching in background
close-up question mark drawn in sand with whale fin nearby
split screen whale jumping and person reacting with awe
call-to-action 'Likez, commentez, partagez !' with Mayotte landscape
scenes.image_prompt: An engaging vertical 9:16 shot with text overlay 'Et vous ? Avez-vous déjà vu les baleines à Mayotte ?' in bold white letters, background showing a humpback whale breaching in the lagoon, a question mark drawn in the sand on the beach with a whale fin nearby, the Mayotte coastline visible in the distance, warm inviting colors encouraging viewers to comment, with a subtle call-to-action to like and subscribe in the corner.
